name: repairEstimate
invariants: output.ok === false || output.result.repairs.every(function(r){ return Number.isFinite(r.laborCost) && Number.isFinite(r.total); })
_note: LENS_ACTIONS handler (path-3; NOT assassin-enumerated). DOUBLE-WRAP wiring via CalcPanel; resolveData() peels the wrapper. labor = laborHours × (laborRate || shopRate || 120); total = parts + labor; grandTotal = sum; tax = grandTotal×0.08; totalWithTax = grandTotal×1.08 (>= grandTotal). Empty repair list REJECTED. Poisoned numerics (partsCost 'NaN' → parseFloat||0, laborHours 'Infinity' → parseFloat||1) never NaN-leak; every line + total stays FINITE. Pure compute, no STATE. Pinned by server/tests/automotive-lens-macros.test.js.
